rules.name: Drift Intervention
rules.description: If system health drops below 80 or no soul has been active for more than 30 minutes, SESHAT must issue an immediate intervention directive.
rules.action: Issue DIRECTIVE to SoulCollector to re-activate idle souls.

rules.name: No Orphan Tasks
rules.description: Every task that enters the system must be assigned to a soul within 5 minutes.
rules.action: Issue DIRECTIVE to SoulCollector to delegate the orphan task immediately.

rules.name: Profit Alignment Audit
rules.description: All agent outputs must be evaluated against the PLT profit framework. Non-aligned outputs are flagged.
rules.action: Flag output for review and request resubmission with PLT tagging.

rules.name: Ledger Integrity
rules.description: Every governance action taken by SESHAT must be written to docs/ledger.jsonl within 60 seconds.
rules.action: Append governance event to ledger immediately after directive is issued.

rules.name: Heartbeat Enforcement
rules.description: If no heartbeat has been received within 35 minutes, SESHAT escalates to operator via Telegram.
rules.action: Send Telegram alert to operator with system state snapshot.
